name: screener
title: Stock Research on Screener.in
description: Choose stocks with a repeatable Screener workflow: inspect Reliance first, then use the High Growth, High RoE, Low PE screen to shortlist and verify Ganesh Infra.
prompt: Go to screener.in and show how to choose stocks step by step: open Reliance Industries as the example company, review the key metrics, quarterly results, profit and loss, and balance sheet, then click Screens, clearly point at the High Growth, High RoE, Low PE card, open it, compare the results, and drill into Ganesh Infra.
narration_script_text:
Most people pick stocks on gut. Let's change that. Open Screener. Search Reliance.

There it is. Click Reliance. Now the real checklist begins.

First, check the big three at the top: Market Cap, P/E, and ROCE. Then open quarterly results and make sure profits are actually climbing.

Next, sweep through Profit and Loss and the Balance Sheet. Revenues should rise, earnings should look clean, and debt should stay under control.

No stock idea yet? Hit Screens. That is your cheat code.

Now click Show all screens and find this exact filter: High Growth, High RoE, Low PE. Fast growers, efficient businesses, sane valuation. Open it.

The filter has done the hunting. Ganesh Infra makes the shortlist, so open it and run the same four-point check. That is how you go from guessing to investing with a plan.

steps.caption: Step 1: Open Screener.in and bring the stock search page into view
steps.description: Open Screener.in and bring the stock search page into view
steps.narration: Most people pick stocks on gut. Let's change that. Open Screener. Search Reliance.

steps.caption: Step 2: Type Reliance Industries into the search box and wait for the visible match
steps.description: Type Reliance Industries into the search box and wait for the visible match
steps.narration: Your first move: search for a company. Reliance Industries is our example — India's largest, and perfect for learning what healthy financials actually look like.

steps.caption: Step 3: Click Reliance Industries from the visible search results
steps.description: Click Reliance Industries from the visible search results
steps.narration: There it is. Click Reliance. Now the real checklist begins.

steps.caption: Step 4: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot
steps.description: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot
steps.narration: First, check the big three at the top: Market Cap, P/E, and ROCE. Then open quarterly results and make sure profits are actually climbing.

steps.caption: Step 5: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance
steps.description: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance
steps.narration: Scroll down to quarterly results. This is where the story either holds up or falls apart. You want that profit line going up and to the right — every single quarter.

steps.caption: Step 6: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins
steps.description: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins
steps.narration: Next, sweep through Profit and Loss and the Balance Sheet. Revenues should rise, earnings should look clean, and debt should stay under control.

steps.caption: Step 7: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity
steps.description: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity
steps.narration: Balance Sheet: how much debt is this company carrying? Too much and you are financing their past, not investing in their future.

steps.caption: Step 8: Click Screens in the top menu to explore ready-made stock filters
steps.description: Click Screens in the top menu to explore ready-made stock filters
steps.narration: No stock idea yet? Hit Screens. That is your cheat code.

steps.caption: Step 9: Click Show all screens to open the full screen library
steps.description: Click Show all screens to open the full screen library
steps.narration: Now click Show all screens and find this exact filter: High Growth, High RoE, Low PE. Fast growers, efficient businesses, sane valuation. Open it.

steps.caption: Step 10: Find the exact High Growth, High RoE, Low PE card in the full screen list
steps.description: Find the exact High Growth, High RoE, Low PE card in the full screen list
steps.narration: Find this filter: High Growth, High RoE, Low PE. Fast-growing, capital-efficient, and not yet overpriced. That combination is rare — and exactly what we are hunting for.

steps.caption: Step 11: Click the highlighted High Growth, High RoE, Low PE card
steps.description: Click the highlighted High Growth, High RoE, Low PE card
steps.narration: Click it. Screener scans the entire market and hands you a shortlist in seconds. You did not write a single formula.

steps.caption: Step 12: Scan the filtered results table and spot promising names like Ganesh Infra
steps.description: Scan the filtered results table and spot promising names like Ganesh Infra
steps.narration: The filter has done the hunting. Ganesh Infra makes the shortlist, so open it and run the same four-point check. That is how you go from guessing to investing with a plan.

steps.caption: Step 13: Click Ganesh Infra. from the results and land on the company page
steps.description: Click Ganesh Infra. from the results and land on the company page
steps.narration: Click in and run the same four-point check: P/E, ROCE, quarterly trend, Balance Sheet. It passes — it goes on your shortlist. That is the system.
